title: ferray-io: NpyElement not implemented for Complex — typed save/load for complex arrays requires DynArray path
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NpyElement is only implemented for primitive types (bool, u8..u128, i8..i128, f32, f64). Complex<f32> and Complex<f64> are handled separately via the dynamic path (load_complex32_dynamic, save_complex_raw). This means save::<Complex<f64>, Ix1>(path, &complex_arr) won't compile — users must go through save_dynamic. NumPy's save/load handle complex transparently. Add NpyElement impls for Complex<f32> and Complex<f64>.
